positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a forest creature combining elements of a fox, a stag, and bioluminescent flora. The creature stands centrally in a stylized, symmetrical pose, featuring sharp, geometric edges and rich, contrasting colors (deep indigo, emerald green, fiery orange). Use a clean silhouette style with high contrast and minimal gradients. The composition should be suitable for a large, central apparel print, isolated on a neutral background. Cinematic, highly detailed, vector art aesthetic, Studio Ghibli influence meets Art Nouveau, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, low detail, messy, dirty, realistic photo, grayscale, monochrome
